## Description

<!-- Thank you for helping us make late.sh better!
Please describe the feature you would like to see here.
You can remove any of the sections below if they are not useful -->


### Is your feature request related to a problem?
_A clear and concise description of what the problem is, e.g. I'm always frustrated when [...]._

### What solution would you like?
_A clear and concise description of what you want to happen._

### What alternatives have you considered?
_A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered._

### Do you have any additional context?
_Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here._
